mechanics.excerpt: The player of the unconscious character must make an Action Check using the same TN as the Knockout Check (p. 1161, with success indi- cating he will wake up at the beginning of the following turn the character altempting (0 wake him up has the First Aid MedTech Skill, he can use one those skills, which case that player rolls Skill Check against the same TN as the Knockout Check: there are no characters available t0 wake up the charac tel if he's simply in hurry; he can ware himself up by spending a Edge point and Complex Action.
